data.body: AC1 READINESS-GATE OPERATOR ATTESTATION (2026-07-11): the mirror-drop's one-way-door readiness gate is satisfied for this deployment. Evidence: (1) this host's global rebar/rebar-mcp auto-update to origin/main HEAD hourly via a rollback-guarded LaunchAgent (pipx from the GitHub mirror at an exact commit), so NO pre-attestations binary remains live in the fleet; (2) the attestations map (epic dark-acme-lumen) shipped well before this change, and all in-tree readers were migrated to signing.most_recent_attestation() in THIS change BEFORE the write-side drop, so no reader observes a stripped mirror; (3) the drop is fully config-reversible with no code downgrade (compact.emit_legacy_signature_mirror=true re-emits on next compaction). The gate + upgrade-first ordering is documented in docs/migrations.md 'Legacy signature-mirror retirement'. The user explicitly authorized the flip (build+flip-to-drop-now) accepting the low fleet risk with the store backed up.
